pages.title: Dusty Cat
pages.description:
Guide a dusty feline through intricate platform puzzles, utilizing precise jump timing and environmental interaction to collect scattered relics. Navigate each level’s dusty corridors while avoiding tricky hazards and discovering hidden paths. The challenge revolves around mastering movement control and unlocking new areas with skillful exploration.

Key Features

• Precision jumping mechanics  
• Environmental puzzle interaction  
• Level-based progression system  
• Hidden collectible relics  
• Dusty platform-themed environments

pages.title: Cat vs Granny. Cat Simulator
pages.description:
Control a mischievous cat navigating through Granny’s house while avoiding traps and obstacles in a close-quarters stealth setup. Use quick reflexes to dash, hide, and manipulate household objects to outsmart Granny’s patrols and accomplish sneaky objectives. Progress through increasingly complex rooms filled with environmental hazards and unpredictable enemy patterns for a casual challenge.

Key Features

• Stealth-based movement mechanics  
• Interactive household object use  
• Multi-room level progression  
• Reactive enemy patrol AI  
• Suburban home environment setting

pages.title: Find Hidden Cats
pages.description:
Search through detailed room scenes to locate hidden cats cleverly camouflaged within cluttered environments. Using point-and-click interaction, players uncover subtle visual clues while advancing through increasingly complex settings filled with playful feline companions. The core challenge lies in spotting well-disguised characters amidst intricate backgrounds to complete each stage.

Key Features

• Point-and-click object spotting  
• Increasingly dense scene layouts  
• Visual clue interpretation system  
• Progressive scene complexity  
• Casual cat-themed discovery

pages.title: My Cat Restaurant
pages.description:
Manage a bustling cat-themed eatery by preparing dishes and serving feline customers in a colorful restaurant setting. Utilize intuitive point-and-click controls to match orders and maintain customer satisfaction through timely service. Progress by unlocking new recipes and upgrades to expand your menu and keep up with growing customer demands.

Key Features

• Order preparation and serving  
• Point-and-click control scheme  
• Progressive recipe and menu unlocks

pages.title: Cute cat's adventures
pages.description:
Navigate through colorful levels with a nimble cat dodging obstacles and collecting items using smooth platforming and precision jumps. Each stage demands careful timing and keen reflexes to overcome unique puzzles and environmental hazards. Players advance by mastering movement and uncovering hidden paths, enjoying a charming world filled with playful challenges.

Key Features

• Precise platform jumping controls  
• Item collection and scoring

pages.title: Inspector Cat

pages.description:
Control agile feline characters through mysterious urban environments in this episodic adventure. Players harness stealth and quick reflexes to navigate dynamic obstacles and uncover hidden paths, while managing unique cat movement styles. The challenge revolves around mastering precise timing and exploration to progress through layered levels filled with environmental puzzles and subtle enemy encounters.

Key Features

• Stealth-based movement mechanics  
• Precision timing navigation controls  
• Environmental puzzle progression  
• Episodic level exploration system  
• Urban nighttime atmosphere
